description_long: This is a tan-colored, four-wheeled armored combat tactical vehicle with an angular, sloped body designed for deflecting projectiles. The vehicle features a fully enclosed cabin with mesh-protected windows and a prominent antenna mounted on the roof, suggesting communication capabilities. The exterior is equipped with spare tires, storage compartments, and utility tools attached to the sides, enhancing its operational versatility. The front and rear display reinforced bumpers, and the vehicle's body is covered in flat, riveted armor panels. Distinctive military markings, including black crosses, are visible on the sides and rear, indicating its military use. The tires are rugged, with deep treads suitable for off-road and urban environments.
description: A tan, angular armored combat vehicle with mesh-protected windows, rugged tires, and military markings. Features include a roof antenna, spare tires, and reinforced armor plating.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the sloped armored nose, mesh-protected windows, and a prominent roof antenna.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the spare tire, side storage compartments, and visible military cross marking.
description_view_2: Rear-right view displaying the rear armor, bucket attachment, and another military cross marking.
description_view_3: Right side view with clear visibility of the spare tire, side storage, and the vehicle's angular armored design.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with sloped, riveted steel armor panels; moderate thickness; no modular or reactive panels visible.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid tan color; no camouflage pattern visible.
attribute_military_markings: Black cross insignia on both sides and rear; white license plate on front.
attribute_tire_type: Four large, off-road tires with deep tread pattern; one spare tire mounted on each side.
